data.title: Walmart expanding delivery to 12 million more households through technology updates
data.description: Walmart's same-day delivery reach will grow, thanks to geospatial technology that the retailer is deploying.

data.title: Xometry touts generating $1 billion in revenue for U.S. manufacturers
data.description: More than 4,375 global suppliers are now active on the B2B marketplace, with the majority of revenue flowing to American manufacturers, Xometry said.

data.title: Full Leaf Tea Company founders reflect on 10 years in ecommerce
data.description: Matt and Lisa Hammonds have gained experience navigating supply chain issues related to tariffs, overhauling their website, testing out old and new marketing tactics, and more.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Price increases already announced due to tariffs
data.description: Shein and Temu both announced price increases, citing tariffs and rising operating expenses.

data.title: BlueSnap integrates with Shopware for B2B Payments processing in North America
data.description: While Shopware is well established in European markets, its move into North America comes amid growing demand from distributors and manufacturers for customizable, API-driven commerce platforms.
